From: Zorroranch@aol.com
Subject: Replacment Windows & Doors - Project 95
Date: Fri, 07 Dec 2007 20:51:23 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc: ehanna@nysgmail.com

Dear Darren, 
    As already mentioned on the report and also over  the last 2 years all 
windows and doors in the main house need to be  replaced. 
    Attached a letter from JJ of 3 B's reconfirming the  work required and 
the fact that if we purchase these items before 12/31/07 we  save an extra 
$45,000. 
    Please be assured that this work will need to be  completed as we have 
major damage already from the leaking doors & windows,  resulting in warped 
wooden floors, plaster work and carpet damage.
   If these items were purchased before the 31st, they would be  stored and 
installation would begin in the Spring. 
    Look forward to comments 
Warmest regards Karen



**************************************Check out AOL's list of 2007's hottest 
products.
(http://money.aol.com/special/hot-products-2007?NCID=aoltop00030000000001)

From:Zorroranch@aol.com
Subject:Replacment Windows & Doors - Project 95
Date:Fri, 07 Dec 2007 20:51:23 GMT
To:DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc:ehanna@nysgmail.com

Dear Darren,
    As already mentioned on the report and also over the last 2 years all windows and doors in the main house need to be replaced.
    Attached a letter from JJ of 3 B's reconfirming the work required and the fact that if we purchase these items before 12/31/07 we save an extra $45,000. 
    Please be assured that this work will need to be completed as we have major damage already from the leaking doors & windows, resulting in warped wooden floors, plaster work and carpet damage.
   If these items were purchased before the 31st, they would be stored and installation would begin in the Spring.
    Look forward to comments
Warmest regards Karen
